name: Michael Alonza P. Ware
title: AI/ML Engineer & Author
bio: Michael is a Computer Science scholar at Weber State University starting August 2026, focused on AI Alignment, Safety, and Governance. He is a technical advocate for Explainable AI (XAI) as a tool for human auditing of complex logical systems.
achievements: Critical Thinker: 52 Books per year target across Philosophy and Psychology
